buildspec.yml.general_idea: Install and configure JDK 21 in the build environment to replace the previous JDK version.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: The build will fail at runtime or during compilation if the project requires JDK 21 features or APIs not present in the default JDK provided by the base image.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Update Maven SonarQube plugin property from deprecated 'sonar.login' to 'sonar.token'.
buildspec.yml.why_exists: The 'sonar.login' property is deprecated and may cause warnings or failures in newer versions of the SonarQube scanner/Maven plugin.

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Change Maven build goal from 'install' to 'deploy' in the commit stage.
Refactor versioning logic to dynamically extract revision and construct project version from POM and git metadata.
Add OWASP dependency check skip configuration to Maven build command.
Add git tagging and pushing logic to the build pipeline to tag releases automatically.
buildspec.yml.after:
git tag -a $PROJECT_VERSION -m "$CODEBUILD_BUILD_ARN"
git push origin HEAD:$VERSION_CHANGELIST $PROJECT_VERSION

buildspec.yml.general_idea: Add new environment variables for git tagging, OWASP scanning, and GitHub authentication.
Add artifact ID variable to environment configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version to 21 to align with the JDK 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping the version at 17 would result in code compiled for the wrong bytecode version or fail enforcer rules if present.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Quarkus framework version to 3.8.1 to support JDK 21 and access newer features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Quarkus versions may not fully support JDK 21 or may have compatibility issues with the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy RESTEasy implementation with the reactive RESTEasy Jackson variant.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus 3.x deprecates or removes the classic RESTEasy in favor of RESTEasy Reactive; using the old artifact may cause runtime errors or missing dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update SLF4J logging library to a version compatible with the new stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older SLF4J versions may have compatibility issues with newer logging bridges or frameworks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Log4j version property to manage logging dependencies explicitly.
Update JUnit Jupiter version to 5.10.1 for better JDK 21 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JUnit versions may not fully support JDK 21 features or may have bugs fixed in newer releases.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update RestAssured version to 5.4.0 for compatibility with newer HTTP clients and JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older RestAssured versions may rely on deprecated HTTP client APIs or have compatibility issues with JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add AssertJ dependency for improved assertion capabilities in tests.
Add Jackson version property to manage JSON processing dependencies.
Add Flyway version property for database migration management.
Add PostgreSQL JDBC driver version property.
Update CloudTrain common REST dependency version.
Update CloudTrain common persistence JPA dependency version.
Update CloudTrain common observability dependency version.
Update CloudTrain common test core dependency version.
Remove obsolete CloudTrain common test Jakarta dependency.
Add Docker multi-platform support property for building images for amd64 and arm64.
Update Kubernetes ingress host to a new domain.
Update Maven Clean Plugin version.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin version to support JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not support JDK 21 language features or bytecode generation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Dependency Plugin version.
Update Maven Deploy Plugin version.
Update Maven Enforcer Plugin version.
Update Maven Failsafe Plugin version.
Update Maven Flatten Plugin version.
Update Maven Install Plugin version.
Update Maven Jar Plugin version.
Update Maven Resources Plugin version.
Update Maven Site Plugin version.
Update Maven Source Plugin version.
Update Maven Surefire Plugin version.
Update Maven War Plugin version.
Update Docker Maven Plugin version.
Update Compose Maven Plugin version.
Update Helm Maven Plugin version.
Update Sonar Maven Plugin version.
Update JaCoCo Maven Plugin version.
Add OWASP Dependency Check Maven Plugin for security scanning.
Replace JUnit Jupiter Engine dependency with Quarkus JUnit5 Mockito extension.
pom.xml.why_exists: Quarkus provides its own test extension that integrates better with the framework; using the standard engine may miss Quarkus-specific test features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace RestAssured dependency with AssertJ Core for assertions.
Remove obsolete cnj-common-test-jakarta dependency.
Remove commented-out Xdoclint compiler argument.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin configuration to the build.
Add Surefire plugin configuration to exclude system tests and set logging manager.
Add Resources plugin configuration to copy Docker, Compose, and Helm resources.
Add Docker Maven Plugin configuration to build and push images.
Add Compose Maven Plugin configuration to manage Docker containers during integration tests.
Add Failsafe plugin configuration to run system tests.
Add JaCoCo plugin configuration for code coverage.
Add Dependency plugin configuration to copy JaCoCo agent to Docker resources.
Add Helm Maven Plugin configuration for linting, packaging, and pushing charts.
Add OWASP Dependency Check plugin execution configuration.
Add Sonar Maven Plugin execution configuration.
Remove the 'local-stage' Maven profile which was likely redundant or unused.
Simplify the 'pre-commit-stage' profile by removing complex Docker build and test execution plugins, replacing them with skip properties for quality assurance tools.
pom.xml.before:
<profile>
    <id>pre-commit-stage</id>
    <build>
        <plugins>
            <!-- surefire, resources, docker-maven, compose-maven, failsafe, dependency, jacoco -->
        </plugins>
    </build>
</profile>

pom.xml.general_idea: Refactor the 'commit-stage' profile to use Docker Buildx for multi-platform image building and remove explicit resource copying and test execution steps.
Update the 'integration-test-stage' profile to skip local Docker/Compose builds and use Helm for deployment instead of manual resource copying.
Replace manual Helm resource copying with the 'helm-maven-plugin' pull and deploy goals in the integration test stage.
Add explicit Maven repository definitions for plugins and dependencies to ensure access to internal artifacts.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image to use a JDK 21 runtime instead of JDK 17.
Switch JVM garbage collector to ZGC with generational support and add UTF-8 encoding flag, removing legacy MetaspaceSize setting.

src/main/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Change the CDI bean scope from Dependent to ApplicationScoped to align with modern Jakarta EE best practices for stateless resources.
Refactor Message object creation from constructor initialization to setter-based initialization to support new fields.
Add explicit locale setting to the Message object to ensure consistent localization handling.
Add import for java.util.Locale to support the new locale setting.
Remove unused import of java.util.Objects as it is no longer used in the class.
Add import for java.util.Locale to support the new locale field.
Remove Javadoc comment block from the class definition.
Add a new private field 'locale' of type Locale to the entity.
Simplify the constructor to only accept UUID, removing code and text parameters.
Add getter and setter methods for the new locale field.
Refactor hashCode to only use the id field, removing dependency on Objects.hash.
Refactor equals method to only compare the id field, removing comparison of code and text.

src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.general_idea: Update comment to remove specific reference to Java EE, generalizing it to just 'application'.
src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.before: # Composes Docker containers and volumes to a runnable Java EE application
src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.after: # Composes Docker containers and volumes to a runnable application

src/test/docker/cnj-security-oidc-backen.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml as it is no longer required in modern Compose specifications.

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Refactor test to use AssertJ assertions instead of RestAssured's built-in Hamcrest matchers for better readability and type safety.
Merge separate tests for failure and success cases into a single comprehensive test method.
Extract response body to a typed Message object to enable detailed field-level assertions.
src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.before: .body("text", response -> startsWith("Dear \"cnj-tester\", welcome to a cloud native Java application"));

src/test/java/group/msg/at/cloud/cloudtr.general_idea: Add explicit import for the Message entity class used in the new test assertions.
